name: Mrs. Adaeze Nwosu
title: Principal
bio: Mrs. Nwosu has led Whitesands School for over a decade with a vision rooted in academic excellence and Catholic values. Before joining Whitesands, she served as Deputy Principal at St. Finbarr's College, Lagos, and held a senior advisory role with the Lagos State Ministry of Education. She is passionate about creating school environments where every student is known by name and given the tools to flourish.

name: Mr. Chidi Okonkwo
title: Deputy Principal — Academics
bio: Mr. Okonkwo oversees curriculum design, examination strategy, and faculty development across all year groups. With a background in curriculum studies and a decade of classroom teaching, he bridges the gap between school leadership and day-to-day teaching. He is the architect of Whitesands' award-winning peer-mentoring programme.

name: Mrs. Ngozi Eze
title: Deputy Principal — Student Affairs
bio: Mrs. Eze is the anchor of student life at Whitesands. She manages pastoral care, the house system, extracurricular activities, and student wellbeing initiatives. Her open-door policy and warmth make her a trusted confidant for students across year groups. She also heads the school's Character Formation programme.

name: Mr. Emmanuel Obi
title: Head of Mathematics
bio: Mr. Obi is celebrated for making mathematics accessible and exciting. His Further Mathematics class consistently achieves the highest pass rates in the school, and his weekly problem-solving club draws students from multiple year groups. Named Teacher of the Term for the second term of 2025/2026.

name: Dr. Ifeoma Anieto
title: Head of STEM & Director of the Innovation Hub
bio: Dr. Anieto brings a research background in biochemistry to her role leading STEM education at Whitesands. She designed the curriculum for the new Innovation Hub and oversees robotics, coding, and engineering programmes. Her students have won regional and national competitions for three consecutive years.
qualifications: Ph.D Molecular Biology (University of Cape Town)
Certificate in STEM Education Leadership (MIT OpenCourseWare)

name: Mrs. Blessing Okwu
title: Head of English & Literature
bio: Mrs. Okwu's English classes are known for spirited debate, close reading, and a genuine love of language. She has published two collections of short stories and brings a writer's sensitivity to her teaching. She sponsors the school's literary magazine, Voices, which showcases student poetry and prose.
qualifications: B.A English & Literary Studies (University of Calabar)
M.A Creative Writing (University of East Anglia, UK)

name: Mr. Kelechi Nwosu
title: Director of Sports & Physical Education
bio: Mr. Nwosu is a former national-level sprinter who now channels his competitive energy into building exceptional student athletes. He manages inter-house sports, the football academy, swimming programme, and athletics training. Under his direction, Whitesands has won the regional inter-school athletics championship twice.
qualifications: B.Sc Physical Education & Sports Science (University of Lagos)
Diploma in Elite Athlete Coaching (Nigerian Institute of Sports)

name: Miss Chiamaka Adeyemi
title: ICT & Computer Science Teacher
bio: Miss Adeyemi teaches ICT from Year 7 and Computer Science at WAEC/IGCSE level. She has introduced Python programming into the Year 8 curriculum and runs a Girls in Tech club that meets every Thursday. She is an advocate for digital literacy as a core life skill.

name: Fr. Patrick Umeh
title: School Chaplain & Religious Studies Teacher
bio: Fr. Patrick is the spiritual heart of the school community. He leads weekly Mass, coordinates retreats and the school's Virtue of the Month programme, and teaches Christian Religious Studies from Year 7 to Year 12. His counsel is sought by students, parents, and staff alike.
qualifications: M.Div Ministry (Spiritan International School of Theology)

name: Mrs. Tope Fadahunsi
title: Head of Arts & Music
bio: Mrs. Fadahunsi leads the Creative Arts department with infectious enthusiasm. She oversees Visual Arts, Music, and Drama, and her productions have received standing ovations at the annual Arts Festival. Several of her former students have gone on to study at leading arts institutions in Nigeria and the UK.
qualifications: B.A Fine Arts (Yaba College of Technology)
Diploma in Music Education (Trinity College London)

name: Mr. Emeka Okafor
title: Head of Sciences (Biology & Chemistry)
bio: Mr. Okafor has coached Whitesands' science competition teams for five years, including the squad that won gold at the National Science Olympiad in 2026. He teaches Biology and Chemistry, and is known for his practical-focused approach — his labs are always busy, always buzzing.
